title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS provides AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and tested procedures to improve success rates. The toolkit includes skills as markdown runbooks, plugins, and MCP configuration to enable agents to deploy and manage AWS infrastructure like Lambda and API Gateway. It includes guardrails, auditability via CloudTrail, and a quickstart guide for team rollout.
